title: Homogeneous and heterogeneous catalysts
summary: 9701 A Level — catalyst types, mechanisms, and industrial examples with PhET sim.
learningObjectives: Give industrial examples of each type.

simpleExplanation.title: Same phase or surface
simpleExplanation.summary: Homogeneous catalysts are in the same phase as reactants. Heterogeneous catalysts provide a solid surface for adsorption.
steps: Heterogeneous: Fe in Haber, V₂O₅ in Contact.
Surface area and poisoning affect activity.

sections.content: **Catalysts** (26.2) extend **rate equations** (26.1). Draw **reaction profile** with lower Ea for catalysed route.
